info.name: Evoorion Real Estate API
info.description: Evoorion Real Estate API — Postman Collection

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication: login, logout, registration, and current user profile.

request.description: Authenticate with email and password. Returns a Sanctum bearer token valid until revoked.

response.name: Invalid credentials

request.description: Create a new user account. The new user receives the 'user' role.

response.name: Email taken

request.description: Revokes the current bearer token.
Returns the authenticated user's profile.

Sends a password reset email. Response is always 200 regardless of whether
the email is registered — prevents user enumeration.
Resets the password using the token received by email. Revokes all existing Sanctum tokens.

item.name: Properties
item.description: Browse, search, and view available properties. No authentication required.

query.description: Keyword search on title and description.
Filter by type. Allowed: villa, apartment, penthouse, townhouse, commercial.
Field to sort by. Default: created_at.

request.description: Paginated list of available properties. Supports filtering, sorting, and search.
Retrieve a single property by slug. Increments the view count on each call.

response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "title": "Luxury Villa in Palm Jumeirah",
    "slug": "luxury-villa-palm-jumeirah",
    "description": "A stunning 4-bedroom villa with private pool and sea view.",
    "type": "villa",
    "price": "2500000.00",
    "currency": "AED",
    "bedrooms": 4,
    "bathrooms": 3,
    "area_sqft": "4500.00",
    "status": "available",
    "is_featured": true,
    "roi_min": "6.00",
    "roi_max": "8.00",
    "views_count": 121,
    "area": {"id": 1, "name": "Palm Jumeirah"},
    "developer": {"id": 1, "name": "Emaar Properties"},
    "operation_type": {"id": 1, "name": "For Sale"},
    "images": [
      {"id": 1, "url": "https://res.cloudinary.com/demo/image/upload/v1/villa.jpg", "is_primary": true}
    ],
    "amenities": [
      {"id": 1, "name": "Swimming Pool"},
      {"id": 2, "name": "Gym"}
    ],
    "created_at": "2025-01-15T10:00:00.000000Z",
    "updated_at": "2025-01-20T08:30:00.000000Z"
  },
  "message": "Operation successful",
  "meta": []
}

request.description:
Compare 2 to 4 available properties by slug. Returns them in the requested order
plus a summary identifying the cheapest, most bedrooms, and largest by sqft.

response.name: Fewer than 2 available slugs

item.name: Leads
item.description:
Submit leads (public) and manage them (admin). Agents see only their assigned leads
and unassigned leads — not other agents' leads.

request.description: Public endpoint for visitors to express interest. Rate-limited to 10 requests per minute per IP.

response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "name": "Ahmed Al-Rashid",
    "email": "ahmed@example.com",
    "phone": "+971501234567",
    "whatsapp": "+971501234567",
    "source": "website",
    "status": "new",
    "property_id": null,
    "budget_min": "500000.00",
    "budget_max": "1000000.00",
    "message": "Looking for a 2-bedroom apartment near the metro.",
    "assigned_to": null,
    "created_at": "2025-01-15T10:00:00.000000Z",
    "updated_at": "2025-01-15T10:00:00.000000Z"
  },
  "message": "Lead submitted successfully"
}

response.name: Validation error

query.description: Filter by status. Allowed: new, contacted, qualified, closed, lost.
Search by name, email, or phone.

request.description: Paginated list of leads. Managers see all leads; agents see only their assigned and unassigned leads.
Returns a single lead with its notes, assigned user, and linked property.

response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "name": "Ahmed Al-Rashid",
    "email": "ahmed@example.com",
    "phone": "+971501234567",
    "whatsapp": "+971501234567",
    "status": "contacted",
    "source": "website",
    "budget_min": "500000.00",
    "budget_max": "1000000.00",
    "message": "Looking for a 2-bedroom apartment.",
    "property": {"id": 1, "title": "Luxury Villa in Palm Jumeirah"},
    "assigned_user": {"id": 2, "name": "Jane Agent", "email": "jane@evoorion.com"},
    "notes": [
      {"id": 1, "note": "Called client, scheduled viewing for 20 Jan.", "created_at": "2025-01-16T09:00:00.000000Z"}
    ],
    "created_at": "2025-01-15T10:00:00.000000Z",
    "updated_at": "2025-01-16T09:00:00.000000Z"
  }
}

request.description: Update the status of multiple leads at once. Accepts up to 100 IDs.

response.name: Validation error

item.name: Lead Tasks
item.description: Follow-up tasks attached to leads. Agents can manage tasks only on their own leads.

item.name: Agencies & Agents
item.description: Manage real estate agencies. Read (list/show) requires agent role; write requires manager or above.

item.name: Master Data
item.description: Reference data: geographic areas. Public read — no authentication required.

variable.description: The ID of the operation type.
The ID of the operation type.
The ID of the operation type.

item.name: Dashboard & Reports
item.description: Aggregated platform statistics and agent performance metrics. Requires agent role or above.

request.description: Platform-wide counts: leads by status and source, active agents, and property availability.
Per-agent breakdown: assigned properties, total leads, closed leads, and close rate.
Count of leads at each pipeline stage plus overall conversion rate.
Daily lead counts for the last N days (default 30, max 90). Every day appears — zero-filled.
All agents ranked by leads closed descending, with close rate percentage.

item.name: Notifications
item.description: In-app notifications for the authenticated user. Each user sees only their own notifications.

request.description: Paginated list of the authenticated user's notifications. Pass `?unread=true` to filter unread only.
Returns the number of unread notifications for the authenticated user.

item.name: Users & Favorites
item.description: Save and retrieve favorited properties for the authenticated user.
